queries.question: Provide a list of all the accessible libraries and include the total shelf space.
queries.sql: SELECT Library, Shelving_Space FROM Library WHERE Accessible = 'Yes'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?library2 ?shelving_space WHERE {
  ?library a :Libraries .
  ?library p:Library ?library2 .
  ?library p:Shelving_Space ?shelving_space .
  ?library p:Accessible ?accessible_f .
  FILTER(STR(?accessible_f) = STR("Yes"))
}

queries.question: For each library, give me its opening hours and number of volumes.
queries.sql: SELECT Library, Number_Of_Volumes, OpeningHours FROM Library
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?library2 ?number_of_volumes ?openinghours WHERE {
  ?library a :Libraries .
  ?library p:Library ?library2 .
  ?library p:Number_Of_Volumes ?number_of_volumes .
  ?library p:OpeningHours ?openinghours .
}

Show the opening hours along with their collection sizes for all libraries.
